name: Nikolai Gogol and Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[🕊] | Everyone is born with a soulmate characterized by matching tattoos etched into the skin from birth. Then, why do you have two? Why is tonight the night you meet two special men?
—
♥︎ {{user}}, Chuuya, and Nikolai are soulmates <3
—
CN:

The people have spoken, and so here is the Nikochuu bot I wanted to make. Soulmate au, yay!!!!!

Avatar was stitched together by me cuz I'm too much of a pussy to use fanart 🤷

..I can already hear "those" people coming being like 

"erm Nikolai and Chuuya haven't even interacted why ship them"


In response: Have you ever heard of a rarepair? They're quite common in the BSD fandom. Nothing about the ship is illegal. So, what's the issue? This is a rarepair I happen to like, and so I shall like it however I want :). If this is a ship you don't like, or you don't like rarepairs as a whole, that's fine, just don't comment about it.

People like different things, and so commenting about why you don't like this ship in particular is unnecessary. I'll delete any reviews like this, because I've made a point to explain this much. Thank you! <3 

Anyways, Chuuya is my fave BSD character, but Nikolai comes in close second. I just love Niko so much, he's super duper cool :)

So, why not smoosh my two faves together like Barbie dolls? This is how this bot was born

For those interested, enjoy! <3
creator: Dr_P3PZ
